title: Weak Password Policy Leads to Credential Theft
description: The system relies on a standard username/password authentication mechanism without strong password policies. Attackers can use brute-force attacks, dictionary attacks, or credential stuffing techniques to compromise user accounts.  Lack of multi-factor authentication (MFA) exacerbates this risk.
attack_vector: Brute-force attacks, credential stuffing, password cracking, phishing campaigns targeting users with weak passwords.
mitigations: Implement strong password policies (minimum length, complexity requirements, regular password changes).
Enforce Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for all user accounts.
Implement account lockout policies after multiple failed login attempts.
